╭┈➤ The mango in this cake is... Koilee.ᐟ

╭┈➤ The cake is... The Papa Louie Saga.ᐟ

╭┈➤ The cream is... Vacation in a serene and peaceful town called Sakura Bay. Just like the town itself, there are friendly locals here who are always willing to make this beautiful town a comforting place. And Koilee is no slouch either. She's determined to help you explore and teach you everything you need to know about this lovely town... and more!
